scene_title: Cidade dividida entre medieval e digital
narrative_beat: Linha de fogo carmesim separando dois mundos aereos

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid aerial diagonal view of divided city left half in rich vivid medieval illuminated colors right half in grey monochrome digital metropolis with crimson fire line separating both worlds in dramatic foreground
subject.focal_point: the crimson fire line separating the vivid medieval half from the grey digital metropolis
subject.secondary: no separate background — the composition is self-contained aerial

composition.foreground: medieval half in vivid crimson gold ochre

lighting.key_light: raking aerial light on medieval half
lighting.fill_light: cold grey digital fill on other half

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, vivid vs mono split grading, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: same pattern Genesis vs Apocalypse — body vs mind, flesh vs silicon

symbolism.primary: the city divided by the same enemy with two faces
symbolism.secondary: fire line as the only honest separator between what was and what is being built

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
